text: The GUI library shall be ported to the Linux platform using the GTK toolkit for the X Window System.
The ported library should be capable of being linked statically if the target distribution uses incompatible toolkit versions.
The GUI library shall implement a widget hierarchy of Window-Vertical Box-Scrolled Window-View Port-Fixed to replicate coordinate-based placement.
The HWND type shall be defined as GtkWidget*.
The HBRUSH type shall be defined as GdkStyle*.
The GUIWinMessageLoop function shall start the program message loop using gtk_main().
The GUIWndInit function shall use gdk_screen_get_width() and gdk_screen_get_height() to retrieve screen dimensions.
The _wpi_setdoubleclicktime function shall set the double click time using gdk_set_double_click_time().
The GUIInitDialogFunc function shall retrieve the dialog box font from the style returned by gtk_widget_get_default_style().
The _wpi_enddialog function shall dismiss a dialog by emitting a delete event to the window via g_signal_emit().
The _wpi_createsolidbrush function shall create a GtkStyle structure with the specified parameters.
The _wpi_create_window_ex function shall initialize a new window using gtk_window_new().
The _wpi_setredraw function shall enable or disable window updates via gdk_window_thaw_updates() and gdk_window_freeze_updates().
The GUIMaximizeWindow function shall maximize the specified window using gtk_window_maximize().
The GUIMinimizeWindow function shall minimize the specified window using gtk_window_minimize().
The _wpi_showwindow function shall show or hide widgets using gtk_widget_show() and gtk_window_hide().
The GUIFreeWindowMemory function shall destroy the window and its children using gtk_object_destroy().
The GUIDialogFunc function shall process resize-request and close events.
The GUIGetText function shall duplicate strings retrieved via gtk_label_get_label() or gtk_button_get_label().
The GUISendMessage function shall send messages to windows using g_signal_emit().
The GUIWndDirty function shall trigger a window repaint using gdk_window_process_updates().
The GUIGetMetrics function shall retrieve font metrics using the Pango library.
The _wpi_mapwindowpoints function shall translate coordinates using gtk_widget_translate_coordinates().
The GUIXDrawText function shall render text using pango_layout_set_text() and gtk_paint_layout().
The _wpi_enablewindow function shall set widget sensitivity using gtk_widget_set_sensitive().
The GUISetText function shall set widget text using gtk_entry_set_text() or gtk_label_set_label().
The GUIDisplayMessage function shall display a message dialog using gtk_message_new().
The GUIDrawStatusText function shall push text to the status window using gtk_status_push().
The GUISetWindowText function shall set the window caption using gtk_set_window_title().
The GUIFontsSupported function shall return TRUE for the GTK port.
The GUISetMouseCursor function shall change the mouse cursor using gdk_window_set_cursor().
The GUISetIcon function shall set the window icon using gtk_window_set_icon().
The GUIHookF1 function shall set the F1 key hook using gtk_key_snooper_install().
